tasks.title: Build StoryboardStatusMenu presentational component (kebab + reveal + keyboard)
tasks.dod: Component renders nothing when isOwner is false, and when owner exposes a hover/focus-revealed kebab whose Regenerate/Hide items are reachable by Tab, activatable by Enter/Space, and dismissible by Escape — proven by a component test.

tasks.title: Build StoryboardRegenerateConfirmModal (focus-trap + Escape + loss enumeration)
tasks.dod: Modal lists exactly the present-loss categories passed in (omitting absent ones), traps focus, fires onConfirm on confirm and onCancel on Cancel/Escape/backdrop — verified by a component test.

tasks.title: Make the two completed blocks visually consistent and drop the Ref box
tasks.dod: On the completed illustration block the Ref thumbnail is no longer rendered for any viewer and the block matches the completed scene block's style — asserted by a component test on the completed state.

tasks.title: Mount the status menu on the completed state of both status blocks
tasks.dod: Both blocks render the status menu only in the completed state (never in-progress/failed) and only when isOwner is true, wiring onRegenerate/onHide/isOwner props through — verified by a component test across states.

tasks.title: useStoryboardHiddenBlocks — session-only hide state with re-show on new cycle
tasks.dod: Hook hides a single named block on demand, leaves the sibling visible, and clears the hidden flag when that block re-enters a generation cycle (status leaves completed) — proven by a hook test; state is in-memory only (resets on remount).

tasks.title: Wire menu, modal, hidden state, owner gate and Regenerate dispatch into the workspace
tasks.dod: Workspace computes isOwner (useAuth id vs draft owner id), threads hidden-block visibility, renders the confirm modal, and on Regenerate dispatches scene-plan retry behind the modal (losses enumerated from current draft) vs illustration start directly with no modal — verified by integration tests covering the destructive/additive split and the single-generation structural guard.

tasks.title: Component + integration tests for the status-menu feature
tasks.dod: Vitest suite covers owner gate (AC-09), state gate (AC-06), Ref-box removal (AC-04), confirm cancel-is-no-op + loss enumeration (AC-05, AC-08), single-block hide + sibling reflow + re-show (AC-02), and rapid-duplicate-Regenerate starts exactly one generation (AC-07) — all green.

tasks.title: E2E + accessibility checks for Regenerate safety and keyboard operability
tasks.dod: E2E asserts the warning always precedes scene regeneration (QG-1), the menu is fully keyboard-operable with no axe violations (QG-2), and the kebab is absent from a non-owner's DOM (AC-09) — suite passes.
